title: Invoice Extraction Result
description: Structured extraction of invoice data from PDF documents for German USt-Voranmeldung. Used as the output schema for LLM-based invoice analysis.

is_invoice.description: True if this document is an invoice (Rechnung) or credit note (Gutschrift). False for letters, forms, offers (Angebote), order confirmations, etc.

document_type.description: Type of document: rechnung=invoice, gutschrift=credit note, angebot=offer/quote, auftragsbestaetigung=order confirmation, mahnung=reminder, sonstiges=other

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (DE, US, IE, NL, etc.)

ust_id.description: USt-IdNr / VAT ID of the vendor if visible (e.g. DE123456789)

tax_treatment.description: How VAT is handled: german_vat=German MwSt charged, reverse_charge=Reverse Charge (Steuerschuldnerschaft geht auf Empfaenger ueber), eu_reverse_charge=EU intra-community, zero_rated=0% VAT, exempt=VAT exempt, non_eu=non-EU vendor, unknown=cannot determine

vorsteuer_recoverable.description: True if the VAT on this invoice is recoverable as Vorsteuer (input tax) for the German USt-Voranmeldung. Only true for german_vat with a valid VAT amount.

notes.description: Any relevant notes, warnings, or observations about the document
